name: mmn_platforms
description: List all marketing platforms supported by MarketMeNow and their content modalities.

name: mmn_instagram_reel_create
description: Generate an Instagram reel from a template and an assignment image. Uses AI (Gemini) for grading, TTS for voiceover, and Remotion for video composition.

assignment.description: Path to the assignment/source image for the reel.

tts.description: TTS provider to use for voiceover.

publish.description: Whether to publish to Instagram immediately.

name: mmn_instagram_carousel_generate
description: Generate a Top-5 carousel using AI (Gemini + Imagen) and optionally publish it to Instagram.

output_dir.description: Output directory for generated carousel images.

publish.description: Whether to publish to Instagram immediately.

name: mmn_instagram_carousel_export
description: Export Figma frames as an Instagram carousel. Requires a Figma API token.

frame_ids.description: Comma-separated Figma frame/node IDs to export.

publish.description: Whether to publish to Instagram immediately.

name: mmn_instagram_reel_list_templates
description: List all available YAML reel templates with their beat counts and FPS.

name: mmn_twitter_engage
description: Run the Twitter/X engagement loop: discover relevant posts, generate AI replies, and post them.

dry_run.description: Generate replies without actually posting them.

max_replies.description: Override the max number of replies (0 = use settings default).

name: mmn_twitter_discover
description: Discover relevant Twitter/X posts without replying. Useful for previewing what the engagement bot would target.

name: mmn_twitter_test_reply
description: Generate an AI reply for a specific tweet URL without posting it.

post_url.description: Full URL of the tweet to generate a reply for.
